notes.author: run-scenario-agent
notes.text:
PASS — Outcome 1 validated on first run (run_artifact_id prod_gates/outcome_1/0). Single IDLER_BOT, scenario completed cleanly via internal 30s timer.

Result signals:
- complete=true (scenario self-terminated via ctx.terminate(); no timeout fallback)
- scenario_summary: "scenario \"prod_gates\" completed; 0/1 bots survived." → survivors=0
- bot was eliminated, then scenario ended

Scenario log markers (all expected ones present):
- "[prod_gates] scenario_start players=1" at t=1777061969969
- "[prod_gates] timer_expired survivors=0 eliminated=1" at t=1777061972469
- "[prod_gates] scenario_end reason=\"timer_expired\" survivors=0"
- Termination reason is "timer_expired" (NOT "early_all_in_victory") ✓
- timer_expired entry shows survivors=0, eliminated=1 ✓

Side observation: scenario log shows "[prod_gates] open_no_damage player=... gate=\"gate2\"" + "gate_opened gate=\"gate2\"" at t+15ms (effectively at scenario_start). This appears to be scenario logic auto-opening a no-damage gate at startup, not bot-triggered (the IDLER never moves). Doesn't affect this outcome — the bot still failed to reach the win condition and was eliminated. Also the wall-clock interval between scenario_start and timer_expired here is only ~2.5s, suggesting the scenario may use accelerated tick-based timing rather than real seconds (the comment "30-second timer" likely refers to in-scenario ticks). Either way, no scenario_script_errors, no websocket_errors, clean termination.

notes.author: create-scenario-agent
notes.text:
Regression-pass on second non-recording run prod_gates/outcome_1/1: complete=true, survivors=0.

Hero-POV recording attempt prod_gates/outcome_1/2 with record_video_bot_index=0 timed out at 3750ms ("scenario timed out after 3750ms; 1/1 bots survived" — note survivors=1 here is because the recording cutoff fires before timer_expired runs and eliminates the idler; the underlying scenario in non-recording mode correctly produces 0 survivors). Recording-mode infrastructure imposes a fixed ~3.75s wall-clock cap that does not honor opts.timeout_ms. Functional spec passes end-to-end without recording.
